runtime_validation.scanner_buy_gate: Risk Guard check is placed before scanner BUY creation
runtime_validation.manual_stop_behavior: Manual stop disables automatic resume eligibility
runtime_validation.startup_safety: Startup is designed to default to stopped state

verdict.reason: Daily realized R reached the hard-lock threshold; new BUY attempts are blocked until the next eligible trading session or manual review.
verdict.public_claim_level: design and smoke validated; not a production guarantee

proof_purpose: Public-safe sample for demonstrating a verifiable Risk Guard decision without exposing private trading runtime code.
